title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
